headline: Google's AI search is so broken it can 'disregard' what you're looking for
summary: Google's AI Overviews are experiencing issues, sometimes acting like a chatbot. A search for 'disregard' yielded an AI chatbot response instead of a summary. This highlights a problem with the AI's ability to provide relevant search summaries.

headline: Twelve South's AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
summary: The AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter is on sale for a great price. It allows wireless headphones to connect to in-flight entertainment. Perfect for upcoming summer travel season and Memorial Day deals.

headline: Meta's Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
summary: Meta launched 'Forum', a new iPhone app combining Facebook Groups with an AI chatbot. It offers a dedicated space for group discussions and AI assistance. The app aims to streamline finding information previously sought on Reddit or Google.

headline: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
summary: Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, is reportedly underperforming and not widely used. A Reuters report indicates minimal US government AI usage of Grok. Concerns persist about Grok's effectiveness and popularity.

headline: Rick and Morty Returns for Season 9 - Here's When You Can Watch New Episodes
summary: Rick and Morty will return for its ninth season. New episodes will be available to stream earlier than before. Fans can anticipate the new season soon.

headline: The iBuypower Gaming PC With AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU and 5090 GPU Drops Below $5,000
summary: A high-end iBuypower gaming PC is now available under $5,000. It features an AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU and a 5090 GPU. Comes with 32GB RAM, 4TB SSD, and a 3-year warranty.

headline: Spartacus: House of Ashur Reportedly Canceled After Just 1 Season
summary: "Spartacus: House Of Ashur" has been reportedly canceled. The Starz series ended after only one season. Steven S. DeKnight's project will not continue.

headline: Destiny Players Review Bomb Marathon Only to Be Met With Countercampaign from Bungie Fans
summary: Destiny players are review-bombing Bungie's new game, Marathon, on Steam. Negative reviews reflect player frustrations with the developer. Bungie fans have launched a counter-campaign to defend Marathon.

headline: Attorney general to review teen boys' rape sentences
summary: The Attorney General will review sentences for three teenage boys. They received non-custodial sentences for the rape of two girls. The review addresses public concern over the leniency of the sentences.

headline: Hot weather to intensify in UK over bank holiday weekend
summary: The UK expects intensifying hot weather over the bank holiday weekend. Amber heat health alerts are issued for parts of England. Regions affected include the Midlands, eastern, and south-east England.

headline: Rubio tries to reassure Nato allies over US troop deployments
summary: Rubio is attempting to reassure NATO allies regarding US troop deployments. This follows President Trump's statements about sending more troops to Poland. The move comes despite officials canceling a similar deployment last week.

headline: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
summary: UK scientists are developing a new Ebola vaccine. It targets the rare Bundibugyo strain, which has no proven vaccine. The vaccine could be ready for trials within months.
